summary: Frontend testing of 4 new educational features - ALL PASS. Hohmann transfer animation, progressive UI, force vectors, and orbital catch-up puzzle all working correctly.

issues: THREE.Clock deprecation warning in console (non-blocking, cosmetic only)

critical_code_review_comments: Hohmann transfer animation in EarthScene.jsx (lines 400-541) properly cycles through 5 phases with burn indicators
Progressive UI in Explore.jsx uses showAdvanced state to hide RAAN/Speed sliders (lines 239-243)
Force vectors in EarthScene.jsx use THREE.ArrowHelper for gravity (red) and velocity (blue) - lines 444-461
CatchUpChallenge.jsx correctly implements orbital mechanics - prograde increases altitude, retrograde decreases
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new educational features verified: (1) Hohmann transfer with animated satellite cycling LEO→burn→transfer→burn→GEO, (2) Progressive UI hides RAAN/Speed behind toggle, (3) Forces toggle shows gravity/velocity explanation, (4) Catch-up puzzle teaches decelerate-to-catch-up concept.

explore_page.hohmann_transfer_toggle: PASS - Shows animated transfer satellite through 5 phases
explore_page.phase_indicator_bar: PASS - Shows LEO ORBIT, BURN +2.46 km/s, TRANSFER COAST, BURN +1.47 km/s, GEO ORBIT with active phase highlighted
explore_page.progressive_ui_default_sliders: PASS - Only Semi-Major Axis, Eccentricity, Inclination visible initially
explore_page.show_advanced_telemetry_toggle: PASS - 'SHOW ADVANCED TELEMETRY' button reveals RAAN and Speed sliders
explore_page.sliders_work_realtime: PASS - Sliders change orbit parameters in real-time
explore_page.compare_orbits_chips: PASS - LEO, GEO overlay chips toggle multiple orbits

learn_page.forces_toggle_visible: PASS - FORCES button visible next to LABELS
learn_page.red_arrow_explanation: PASS - Red arrow = gravity pulling toward Earth

challenge_page.two_satellites_labeled: PASS - YOU (cyan) and TARGET (red) satellites with labels
challenge_page.telemetry_hud: PASS - Shows GAP, YOUR SPEED, TARGET SPEED, YOUR ALT
challenge_page.prograde_increases_altitude: PASS - Altitude increased from ~4778km to ~6371km after prograde
challenge_page.retrograde_decreases_altitude: PASS - Altitude decreased to ~3186km after retrograde

navigation.challenge_link: PASS - CHALLENGE link with Target icon in navigation

home_page.3d_scene: PASS - Home page loads with 3D Earth and orbits

hohmann_transfer_animation.phase_indicator: 5 phases displayed at bottom with active phase highlighted
hohmann_transfer_animation.burn_indicators: Burn phases show velocity changes (+2.46 km/s and +1.47 km/s)

progressive_ui.description: Only 3 sliders visible by default, RAAN/Speed hidden behind toggle
progressive_ui.toggle_text: SHOW ADVANCED TELEMETRY / HIDE ADVANCED TELEMETRY

force_vectors.description: FORCES toggle shows gravity/velocity explanation on Learn page

orbital_catchup_puzzle.description: Interactive puzzle teaching counter-intuitive decelerate-to-catch-up concept
orbital_catchup_puzzle.mechanics: Prograde raises orbit (slower), Retrograde lowers orbit (faster)
orbital_catchup_puzzle.telemetry: GAP, speeds, altitude displayed in HUD
orbital_catchup_puzzle.phase_feedback: Shows COUNTER-INTUITIVE!, THINK BACKWARDS, CATCHING UP!, RENDEZVOUS! phases
